textByHash.313629761eae5b4e4b6f5909d6d16a04405f9916: Nilsal, my child. Welcome to this holy temple of Ralos.
textByHash.640e37092ac9e809d1596df87ea101dd00996d08: If there is anything I can do for you, please just let me know.
textByHash.0d0ca9b811e7e574cd035daeb208ccf3507635bc: I am one of the seven teoki in service to Ralos.
textByHash.14a595c7e1f5dabe2a34f0518173efbe83b60596: Indeed. Along with our counterparts from the Sect of Ranul, each of us is responsible for one of seven key holy sites across the region.
textByHash.296f4db89a450e8e4b6a24e64c1bad974aa4f77b: As you have likely guessed, my duty is to maintain the temple here in Fortis.
textByHash.e0da591f0884854a6de65437033050236ef06818: Timoiva, and may the sun light your way.
